turns.content: Help me plan my week. I have a dentist appointment Tuesday, need to finish the API redesign by Thursday, and want to prep for the team retrospective on Friday.

📋 SUMMARY: Weekly planning for Feb 11-15 with dentist, API redesign deadline, and retro prep.

Here's a structured plan for your week, Jm:

**Tuesday (Feb 12)**
- Dentist appointment — block recovery time after if needed
- Start/continue API redesign work (lighter day around appointment)

**Wednesday (Feb 13)**
- Deep focus day on API redesign — this is your critical push day
- Aim for 1-2 Pomodoro sessions (supports S1)
- Get to "reviewable" state by end of day

**Thursday (Feb 14)**
- Morning: Final API redesign polish and any review feedback
- API redesign deadline — ship it
- Afternoon: Start gathering retro notes (what went well, what didn't, action items)

**Friday (Feb 15)**
- Morning: Finalize retro prep — talking points, data, proposals
- Team retrospective
- Weekly review / wrap-up

**Threading in your lead measures:**
- S3/S4 (Community Events & Social Invitations) — these are flagged critical. Is there anything mid-week you could attend or someone you could reach out to?
- S1/S5 (Pomodoro & Alignment Hour) — Wed is ideal for stacking these with the API push
- S6 (Morning Stretch) — currently at 0%. Even 10 min each morning this week would be a start

Anything you want me to add to your calendar or break down further?

🗣️ Kaya: Week planned around dentist Tuesday, API deadline Thursday, retro Friday. Lead measures threaded in.
